message:
Replace broken WASM CLIP with Transformers.js

The WASM CLIP encoder was never fully implemented - it just returned
dummy hash-based pseudo-random embeddings. This caused vector search
to return completely wrong results.

Now using Transformers.js with the same OpenAI CLIP ViT-B/32 model
that was used to create the dataset embeddings. This provides:
- Correct CLIP text embeddings that match dataset image embeddings
- ~100MB model download (cached by browser)
- Proper L2 normalization
- No more GGUF model selector (single model for consistency)
